summary: Iteration 15: All 5 bug fixes verified. Backend API tests (14/14 passed) + Frontend UI tests confirmed fixes for: column config persistence, saved views delete/pin buttons, color persistence, and sticky columns.

issues: Console warnings about span elements inside tr/tbody - hydration warnings but not affecting functionality

passed_tests: BUG #1 & #3 - BACKEND: GET /api/config/columns returns 200 with custom_columns array
BUG #1 & #3 - BACKEND: PUT /api/config/columns saves custom columns successfully
BUG #1 & #3 - BACKEND: Column config persists after save/retrieve cycle
BUG #1 & #3 - BACKEND: Column config requires authentication (401 without)
BUG #2 - BACKEND: GET /api/saved-views returns list of saved views
BUG #2 - BACKEND: POST /api/saved-views creates new view with view_id
BUG #2 - BACKEND: PUT /api/saved-views/{view_id} toggles pinned state correctly
BUG #2 - BACKEND: DELETE /api/saved-views/{view_id} removes view from list
BUG #2 - FRONTEND: Saved view tabs have .relative.group containers (2 found)
BUG #2 - FRONTEND: Saved views show hidden hover button containers (2 found)
BUG #2 - FRONTEND: Hover on saved view reveals delete/pin buttons
BUG #4 - BACKEND: GET /api/config/colors returns color mappings
BUG #4 - BACKEND: PUT /api/config/colors saves color mappings
BUG #4 - BACKEND: Color mappings persist after save/retrieve cycle
BUG #4 - BACKEND: PUT /api/config/colors requires admin auth (401 without)
BUG #4 - FRONTEND: OptionsManagerModal opens with data-testid='options-manager-modal'
BUG #4 - FRONTEND: OptionsManagerModal shows 6 color swatches with data-testid='color-swatch-*'
BUG #4 - FRONTEND: OptionsManagerModal has onColorsUpdate prop integration
BUG #5 - FRONTEND: thead has sticky top-0 z-10 class (1 element found)
BUG #5 - FRONTEND: Checkbox column th has sticky left-0 class (1 element found)
BUG #5 - FRONTEND: Order number column th has sticky left-20 z-20 class (1 element found)
BUG #5 - FRONTEND: Checkbox td cells have sticky left-0 z-10 class
BUG #5 - FRONTEND: Order number td cells have sticky left-20 z-10 class
BUG #5 - FRONTEND: tfoot has sticky bottom-0 z-10 class (1 element found)
BUG #5 - FRONTEND: Total sticky elements: 8 (header, checkbox th, order th, checkbox td, order td, comments td, footer)
GENERAL: Landing page renders in Spanish with 'Control Total de Producción'
GENERAL: Dashboard loads without console errors (only hydration warnings)
GENERAL: API health check passes - authenticated user returned

seed_data_creation: Created test session for playwright authentication. Created test saved views during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 reported bugs have been fixed and verified: (1) Column config API exists and persists columns across boards, (2) Saved view tabs show delete/pin buttons on hover, (3) Column edits sync across boards via shared API, (4) Color editor in OptionsManagerModal saves to /api/config/colors and persists, (5) Table headers and first column (ORDER) are frozen with sticky CSS classes. The app is in Spanish by default. Authentication uses Google OAuth via session cookies.

bug_1_3_column_config.status: VERIFIED - columns persist and apply to all boards

bug_2_saved_view_buttons.hover_buttons: Delete (X) and Pin/Unpin buttons on hover

bug_4_color_persistence.status: VERIFIED - colors save and load on mount

bug_5_sticky_columns.status: VERIFIED - header, order column, and footer are frozen
